name: Sarah Chen
bio: Met freshman year at MIT. We bonded over terrible dining hall food and late-night problem sets. Now she's crushing it as a product manager in SF.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: Former manager who took a chance on me when I was a junior developer. His advice helped shape my career path. We try to catch up quarterly.

name: Emma Rodriguez
bio: Neighbors since age 6. We've been through everything together - first day of school, first heartbreaks, college applications. She's a pediatric nurse now.

name: David Park
bio: Roommate junior year. We started training for marathons together and never stopped. He's run Boston twice now and won't let me forget it.

name: Priya Patel
bio: Started the same week at our company three years ago. We've tried every restaurant within walking distance of the office. She's the only one who truly gets the office politics.

name: Alex Thompson
bio: High school garage band days. We thought we'd be rockstars. Now he teaches guitar to kids and I write code, but we still jam when we can.

name: Lisa Wong
bio: Study group partner who went on to start her own sustainable fashion brand. Her hustle is inspiring. We meet monthly to swap business and career advice.

name: James Miller
bio: Met at a hackathon five years ago. We've been gaming together every Friday night since - currently deep into Elden Ring co-op runs.
